_categories.scheduler: Tests internal scheduler API directly, not renderer contract
_categories.directives: el binding in directives gets TestNode wrapper instead of raw element
_categories.vnode: Tests internal VNode normalization/cloning, not renderer
_categories.reactivity_internals: Uses targetMap/getDepFromReactive — not in public @vue/reactivity API
_categories.reactivity_version_mismatch: Tests from v3.5.12 source, installed @vue/reactivity is v3.5.0 — features like startBatch, debug event tracking changes, once-option fix were added after 3.5.0
_categories.apiExpose_ref_owner: Adapter createApp().render() doesn't set proper ref owner context for template refs on exposed instances
_categories.apiAsyncComponent_ref_forwarding: Template ref forwarding on async wrapper components not supported by adapter
_categories.keepalive_include: KeepAlive include/exclude matching requires full component name resolution
_categories.rendererTemplateRef_reactive: Direct reactive property ref test times out in adapter environment
_categories.scopeId_suspense: Suspense content scopeId attachment requires internal Suspense implementation detail
